step_rationale: Diagnostic biomarker for AMI; targets KLF2, a regulator of endothelial cell viability and mechanotransduction.
mechanism: miR-32-5p impairs endothelial KLF2 expression, compromising endothelial mechanotransduction and promoting erosion-type MI.

references.title: Silence of miR-32-5p promotes endothelial cell viability by targeting KLF2 and serves as a diagnostic biomarker of acute myocardial infarction.
